title: Shiny Ores - Heycronus
description: Step into a brighter mining experience with the 'Shiny Ores' texture pack! This pack enhances your Minecraft world by making all ores glow in the dark, providing you with better visibility while mining
body:
![shiny ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b9b6996c60f06247c841505f905d0fc74a91aa3.png)

### **Optifine Required**

Step into a brighter mining experience with the 'Shiny Ores' texture pack! This pack enhances your Minecraft world by making all ores glow in the dark, providing you with better visibility while mining. Perfect for players who love to explore caves and hunt for resources, 'Shiny Ores' ensures you never miss a valuable ore, even in the darkest corners.

The 'Shiny Ores' texture pack is designed to enhance your Minecraft mining adventures by making all ores glow in the dark. With this pack, you'll find it easier than ever to locate valuable resources, even in the deepest, darkest caves. The subtle glow emitted by the ores not only adds a unique visual appeal but also makes your mining experience more efficient and enjoyable. Whether you're searching for diamonds, gold, or any other ore, 'Shiny Ores' ensures you never miss a find. This pack is lightweight, compatible with other texture packs, and optimized for smooth performance, making it a must-have for any dedicated miner. Illuminate your world and uncover treasures with 'Shiny Ores' today!

**Features:**
- **Glow-in-the-Dark Ores:** All ores emit a subtle glow, making them stand out against the darkness of caves and tunnels.
- **Enhanced Visibility:** Easily locate diamonds, gold, redstone, and more, even in low-light environments.
- **Immersive Mining Experience:** Adds a mystical and vibrant touch to your mining adventures without altering the original look and feel of the game.
- **Compatible with Other Packs:** 'Shiny Ores' can be used alongside other texture packs to complement your personalized Minecraft experience.
- **Optimized for Performance:** Lightweight and efficient, ensuring smooth gameplay without compromising on visual quality.

## Ajude Com qualquer Quantia ( Não Reenbolsável )
